style_effects: Gentle blue water droplets cling to Charizard's scales, slowly rising like bubbles before dissolving into mist. A soft, cool blue-white aura radiates from its body in concentric ripples, illuminating the surrounding air with a serene, reflective glow. The lighting mood is calm and aquatic, with shimmering droplets casting faint reflections on the ground. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
